serviceArea: Twin Cities Metro & surrounding counties within 60 miles
about: Precision Fence Co. was founded in 2008 by Tom Harrelson, a third-generation carpenter who grew up watching his grandfather build fences across rural Minnesota. What started as a two-person crew has grown into the region's most trusted fencing contractor.
aboutExtra: We've installed over 2,400 fences and counting. Every project gets the same attention to detail — whether it's a 50-foot garden border or a multi-acre ranch perimeter.

testimonials.name: Margaret Lindgren
testimonials.text: They replaced our old chain link with a beautiful cedar fence. The crew was professional, on time, and left the yard spotless. Couldn't be happier.

testimonials.name: David Kowalski
testimonials.text: Got three estimates and Precision Fence was the most thorough. They handled our HOA paperwork and the aluminum fence looks incredible around the pool.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.text: Our vinyl fence has held up through two harsh winters without a single issue. The lifetime post warranty gave us real peace of mind.

home.title: Precision Fence Co. | Fence Installation & Repair in Minneapolis, MN
home.description: Professional fence installation in the Twin Cities metro. Wood, vinyl, aluminum & chain link fencing. Free estimates. Licensed & insured. Call (555) 123-4567.
